raw_consumer_statement: Hey my name is XXXX XXXX i m XXXX. i have home depot credit card for several years. i have been notice there are some charges on card that i tried report dispute charge and they dont help or refund money back because they think its my responsible. said i have to owe XXXX which is not true. i m trying to fix this problem with them but they refused help me and they said i have to do something else to fix this. i m not sure how to fix this problem.. i want them remove all amount on credit card so put in good standing. I tried so hard to fix this problem.. also they keep hang on me on the phone because i used relay since i m XXXX.
